$comment: Consumer repos that pin @momentiq/dark-factory-cli and receive on-publish auto-bump dispatches. The sdk-release.yml `dispatch-consumers` job reads this list and POSTs a repository_dispatch{type: df-cli-released, version} to each after a successful CLI publish. Each consumer has a thin .github/workflows/df-cli-bump.yml that `uses:` momentiq-ai/dark-factory/.github/workflows/consumer-cli-bump.yml@<sha> to open the bump PR. Add a repo here AND give it the receiver workflow to onboard it. Tracking: #280.

consumers.note: W2 migration target; pins df-cli devDep + dark-factory-pr.yml literals.
carries the original Renovate config (#214); dispatch supersedes the inert poll.
